title: phyllobotryon bracteatum
intro: Phyllobotryon bracteatum, also known as the fragrant bract fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phyllobotryon bracteatum include its ability to soothe coughs and reduce inflammation, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
